summary: Transform/matrix math core: atan2/sin/cos lookup tables, 4x4 matrix ops (float + fixed-point Mtx), Euler angle rotation, transform hierarchy (parent/child/sibling composition), coordinate transforms, and RSP cache writeback.
subsystems: Trig tables: atan2 LUT (D_8004CD90), sin/cos LUT (D_80050F14) — both read-only rodata
Float matrix (x_f9704fd6): identity, multiply, Euler rotation (XYZ/ZYX/single-axis), scale, transpose, copy
Fixed-point Mtx: construction from Euler angles, identity, partial identity, float-to-fixed conversion
Transform hierarchy: transform_init_node links nodes, x_44a54e96 recursively computes world transforms
RSP prep: x_342bc581 flushes pre-allocated Mtx via guMtxIdent + osWritebackDCache
open_questions: x_9a6513bb has a potential bug in the 1/4096 scale conversion — required to match?
What is the exact format of x_f9704fd6? (4 rows of x_123b8fa2 with x/y/z/w)
